records.m_Talk_ENG: Chief! We subdued all Society members that invaded LAKE-9!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chief! We subdued all Society members that invaded LAKE-9!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chief! We subdued all Society members that invaded LAKE-9!

records.m_Talk_ENG: LAKE-2 is complete as well!
records.m_Talk_DEU: LAKE-2 is complete as well!
records.m_Talk_FRA: LAKE-2 is complete as well!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good work, everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good work, everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good work, everyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Out of the seven facilities that the Society ambushed, LAKE-4, LAKE-7, and LAKE-11 are still in battle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Out of the seven facilities that the Society ambushed, LAKE-4, LAKE-7, and LAKE-11 are still in battle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Out of the seven facilities that the Society ambushed, LAKE-4, LAKE-7, and LAKE-11 are still in battle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Three facilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Three facilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Three facilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chief, you must make a decision.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chief, you must make a decision.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chief, you must make a decision.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Without the Counter agents, we won't be able to protect all the remaining quarantine facilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Without the Counter agents, we won't be able to protect all the remaining quarantine facilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Without the Counter agents, we won't be able to protect all the remaining quarantine facilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the case of LAKE-4, they haven't fully recovered from the last attack from the Society.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the case of LAKE-4, they haven't fully recovered from the last attack from the Society.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the case of LAKE-4, they haven't fully recovered from the last attack from the Society.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sealed Fragment was consumed quite a bit because of the alliance between the Society and Elysium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sealed Fragment was consumed quite a bit because of the alliance between the Society and Elysium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sealed Fragment was consumed quite a bit because of the alliance between the Society and Elysium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Its strategic value is less than the other quarantine facilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Its strategic value is less than the other quarantine facilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Its strategic value is less than the other quarantine facilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You wish to have LAKE-4 destroyed with this opportunity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You wish to have LAKE-4 destroyed with this opportunity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You wish to have LAKE-4 destroyed with this opportunity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We don't have time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We don't have time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We don't have time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't it better to bury them alive with the Fragment rather than for them to seize it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it better to bury them alive with the Fragment rather than for them to seize it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it better to bury them alive with the Fragment rather than for them to seize it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure the members there will be glad to offer their lives for the cause.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure the members there will be glad to offer their lives for the cause.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure the members there will be glad to offer their lives for the cause.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope you make the right decision, Chief!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope you make the right decision, Chief!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope you make the right decision, Chief!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The highest-level disaster alert, the Dean of Archeology breaking out, and the ambush on the quarantine facilities...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The highest-level disaster alert, the Dean of Archeology breaking out, and the ambush on the quarantine facilities...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The highest-level disaster alert, the Dean of Archeology breaking out, and the ambush on the quarantine facilities...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It hasn't been that long since the Qliphoth Game ended, but the Institution is experiencing one bad luck after another.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It hasn't been that long since the Qliphoth Game ended, but the Institution is experiencing one bad luck after another.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It hasn't been that long since the Qliphoth Game ended, but the Institution is experiencing one bad luck after another.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still, I cannot avoid making a decision.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still, I cannot avoid making a decision.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still, I cannot avoid making a decision.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Instruct all members at LAKE-4 to evacuate!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Instruct all members at LAKE-4 to evacuate!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Instruct all members at LAKE-4 to evacuate!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander! We received orders to evacuate!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander! We received orders to evacuate!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander! We received orders to evacuate!

records.m_Talk_ENG: LAKE-4 will be collapsing from here on out! We have to make haste! We must evacuate the island!
records.m_Talk_DEU: LAKE-4 will be collapsing from here on out! We have to make haste! We must evacuate the island!
records.m_Talk_FRA: LAKE-4 will be collapsing from here on out! We have to make haste! We must evacuate the island!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go ahead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me? I don't understand!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me? I don't understand!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me? I don't understand!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone has to stay here and hold those Society wretches in place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone has to stay here and hold those Society wretches in place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone has to stay here and hold those Society wretches in place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, someone has to stay here and get rid of all the information and documents.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, someone has to stay here and get rid of all the information and documents.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, someone has to stay here and get rid of all the information and documents.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And someone...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And someone...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And someone...

records.m_Talk_ENG: has to stay here and watch the bloody Society monsters get buried alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: has to stay here and watch the bloody Society monsters get buried alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: has to stay here and watch the bloody Society monsters get buried alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything, their struggles and their pain...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything, their struggles and their pain...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything, their struggles and their pain...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or else this sacrifice won't mean anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or else this sacrifice won't mean anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or else this sacrifice won't mean anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chief has already taken this into consideration as she gave this order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chief has already taken this into consideration as she gave this order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chief has already taken this into consideration as she gave this order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So hurry up and leave!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So hurry up and leave!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So hurry up and leave!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bloody hell! Are you kidding?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bloody hell! Are you kidding?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bloody hell! Are you kidding?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You could've spared me the speech! Now there's no way I can run away after hearing all that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You could've spared me the speech! Now there's no way I can run away after hearing all that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You could've spared me the speech! Now there's no way I can run away after hearing all that!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Shut it! Quickly, get out
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Shut it! Quickly, get out
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Shut it! Quickly, get out
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what? This...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what? This...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what? This...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
My body just split in
8g?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
My body just split in
8g?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
My body just split in
8g?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Easy....
records.m_Talk_DEU: Easy....
records.m_Talk_FRA: Easy....

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your minds are so easy to predict it's almost tiring.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your minds are so easy to predict it's almost tiring.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your minds are so easy to predict it's almost tiring.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, Mother's children.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, Mother's children.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, Mother's children.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Break the Sealing Chains in the facility and erupt the Fragment!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Break the Sealing Chains in the facility and erupt the Fragment!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Break the Sealing Chains in the facility and erupt the Fragment!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander! We've received concerning news from Area A-3!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander! We've received concerning news from Area A-3!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander! We've received concerning news from Area A-3!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It has the same features and outfits as the person of interest that was mentioned at the Round Table!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It has the same features and outfits as the person of interest that was mentioned at the Round Table!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It has the same features and outfits as the person of interest that was mentioned at the Round Table!

records.m_Talk_ENG: He and the followers are dismantling the Sealing Chains.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He and the followers are dismantling the Sealing Chains.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He and the followers are dismantling the Sealing Chains.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fragment is 34% activated...! Going up to 43%!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fragment is 34% activated...! Going up to 43%!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fragment is 34% activated...! Going up to 43%!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's increasing! At this rate...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's increasing! At this rate...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's increasing! At this rate...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bollocks! We won't even have enough time to evacuate!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bollocks! We won't even have enough time to evacuate!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bollocks! We won't even have enough time to evacuate!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're going to lose the Fragment! We have to destroy the facility, now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're going to lose the Fragment! We have to destroy the facility, now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're going to lose the Fragment! We have to destroy the facility, now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is control room!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is control room!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is control room!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chief, we are ready to bury them alive at any moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chief, we are ready to bury them alive at any moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chief, we are ready to bury them alive at any moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. The Institution will not forget your noble sacrifice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. The Institution will not forget your noble sacrifice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. The Institution will not forget your noble sacrifice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From here on end, LAKE-4 will be entering complete destruction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From here on end, LAKE-4 will be entering complete destruction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From here on end, LAKE-4 will be entering complete destruction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the responsibility...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the responsibility...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the responsibility...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: will be all mine to shoulder.
records.m_Talk_DEU: will be all mine to shoulder.
records.m_Talk_FRA: will be all mine to shoulder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Orders received, Chief!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Orders received, Chief!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Orders received, Chief!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Destroy LAKE-4! Detonate all explosives!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Destroy LAKE-4! Detonate all explosives!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Destroy LAKE-4! Detonate all explosives!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Detonate!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Detonate!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Detonate!

records.m_Talk_ENG: LAKE-4 has been destroyed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: LAKE-4 has been destroyed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: LAKE-4 has been destroyed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fragment is at 0%, and no... lifeforms detected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fragment is at 0%, and no... lifeforms detected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fragment is at 0%, and no... lifeforms detected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good work everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good work everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good work everyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
And I'll be giving the commanding power of the next quarantine facility to
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
And I'll be giving the commanding power of the next quarantine facility to
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
And I'll be giving the commanding power of the next quarantine facility to
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-chief...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-chief...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-chief...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We received comms from the commander line... of the lost LAKE-4.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We received comms from the commander line... of the lost LAKE-4.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We received comms from the commander line... of the lost LAKE-4.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The F-Fragment...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The F-Fragment...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The F-Fragment...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You swallowed the giant Fragment... in an instant...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You swallowed the giant Fragment... in an instant...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You swallowed the giant Fragment... in an instant...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what are you... I need to warn Chief...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what are you... I need to warn Chief...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what are you... I need to warn Chief...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be borrowing this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be borrowing this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be borrowing this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Just as I thought.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Just as I thought.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Just as I thought.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had expected as much, but it is still interesting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had expected as much, but it is still interesting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had expected as much, but it is still interesting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are leading people in this world as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are leading people in this world as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are leading people in this world as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you would sacrifice the small for the greater cause, once again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you would sacrifice the small for the greater cause, once again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you would sacrifice the small for the greater cause, once again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heir of Pendragon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heir of Pendragon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heir of Pendragon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am well aware that I'm famous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am well aware that I'm famous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am well aware that I'm famous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it is very disturbing to hear my family's name being uttered by a complete stranger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it is very disturbing to hear my family's name being uttered by a complete stranger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it is very disturbing to hear my family's name being uttered by a complete stranger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you the worshipper of the false god that defeated Ryan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you the worshipper of the false god that defeated Ryan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you the worshipper of the false god that defeated Ryan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ryan? Ahh, right. He was a well-trained hound.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ryan? Ahh, right. He was a well-trained hound.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ryan? Ahh, right. He was a well-trained hound.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was able to enjoy the fight thanks to him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was able to enjoy the fight thanks to him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was able to enjoy the fight thanks to him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Enough nonsense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Enough nonsense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Enough nonsense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I do not know for what reason you are doing this,
records.m_Talk_DEU: I do not know for what reason you are doing this,
records.m_Talk_FRA: I do not know for what reason you are doing this,

records.m_Talk_ENG: but you're cultists who haven't even been recognized by the Society. Do you really wish to wage a full-scale war on the Institution?
records.m_Talk_DEU: but you're cultists who haven't even been recognized by the Society. Do you really wish to wage a full-scale war on the Institution?
records.m_Talk_FRA: but you're cultists who haven't even been recognized by the Society. Do you really wish to wage a full-scale war on the Institution?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not willing to answer, I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not willing to answer, I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not willing to answer, I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, here is your last chance to defend yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, here is your last chance to defend yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, here is your last chance to defend yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where is the Fragment that was sealed at LAKE-4?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where is the Fragment that was sealed at LAKE-4?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where is the Fragment that was sealed at LAKE-4?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah. Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah. Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah. Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It would be unwise to go on a full-scale war with the Institution considering the number of people we currently have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It would be unwise to go on a full-scale war with the Institution considering the number of people we currently have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It would be unwise to go on a full-scale war with the Institution considering the number of people we currently have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I am so fully aware of the way you do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I am so fully aware of the way you do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I am so fully aware of the way you do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The way we do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The way we do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The way we do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then your attacking different facilities at once is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then your attacking different facilities at once is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then your attacking different facilities at once is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought that you would sacrifice this place... to protect the other facilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought that you would sacrifice this place... to protect the other facilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought that you would sacrifice this place... to protect the other facilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all, you always mercilessly sacrifice the little people for the greater good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all, you always mercilessly sacrifice the little people for the greater good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all, you always mercilessly sacrifice the little people for the greater good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But this place was our goal from the start.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But this place was our goal from the start.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But this place was our goal from the start.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This Fragment is enough to make preparations for waking Mother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This Fragment is enough to make preparations for waking Mother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This Fragment is enough to make preparations for waking Mother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother wishes the Lake of Knowledge to be one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother wishes the Lake of Knowledge to be one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother wishes the Lake of Knowledge to be one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And... I will make it happen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And... I will make it happen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And... I will make it happen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if you are to stand in my way... I will kill you without a second thought.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if you are to stand in my way... I will kill you without a second thought.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if you are to stand in my way... I will kill you without a second thought.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heir of Pendragon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heir of Pendragon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heir of Pendragon.

root.m_Talk_DEU: LAKE-4 will be collapsing from here on out! We have to make haste! We must evacuate the island!
root.m_Talk_FRA: LAKE-4 will be collapsing from here on out! We have to make haste! We must evacuate the island!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Go ahead.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Go ahead.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Go ahead.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me? I don't understand!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me? I don't understand!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me? I don't understand!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone has to stay here and hold those Society wretches in place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone has to stay here and hold those Society wretches in place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone has to stay here and hold those Society wretches in place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also, someone has to stay here and get rid of all the information and documents.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also, someone has to stay here and get rid of all the information and documents.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also, someone has to stay here and get rid of all the information and documents.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And someone...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And someone...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And someone...

root.m_Talk_ENG: has to stay here and watch the bloody Society monsters get buried alive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: has to stay here and watch the bloody Society monsters get buried alive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: has to stay here and watch the bloody Society monsters get buried alive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everything, their struggles and their pain...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everything, their struggles and their pain...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everything, their struggles and their pain...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or else this sacrifice won't mean anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or else this sacrifice won't mean anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or else this sacrifice won't mean anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Chief has already taken this into consideration as she gave this order.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Chief has already taken this into consideration as she gave this order.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Chief has already taken this into consideration as she gave this order.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So hurry up and leave!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So hurry up and leave!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So hurry up and leave!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bloody hell! Are you kidding?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bloody hell! Are you kidding?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bloody hell! Are you kidding?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You could've spared me the speech! Now there's no way I can run away after hearing all that!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You could've spared me the speech! Now there's no way I can run away after hearing all that!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You could've spared me the speech! Now there's no way I can run away after hearing all that!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Shut it! Quickly, get out
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Shut it! Quickly, get out
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Shut it! Quickly, get out
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what? This...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what? This...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what? This...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
My body just split in
8g?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
My body just split in
8g?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
My body just split in
8g?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Easy....
root.m_Talk_DEU: Easy....
root.m_Talk_FRA: Easy....

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your minds are so easy to predict it's almost tiring.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your minds are so easy to predict it's almost tiring.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your minds are so easy to predict it's almost tiring.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, Mother's children.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, Mother's children.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, Mother's children.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Break the Sealing Chains in the facility and erupt the Fragment!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Break the Sealing Chains in the facility and erupt the Fragment!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Break the Sealing Chains in the facility and erupt the Fragment!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Commander! We've received concerning news from Area A-3!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Commander! We've received concerning news from Area A-3!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Commander! We've received concerning news from Area A-3!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It has the same features and outfits as the person of interest that was mentioned at the Round Table!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It has the same features and outfits as the person of interest that was mentioned at the Round Table!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It has the same features and outfits as the person of interest that was mentioned at the Round Table!

root.m_Talk_ENG: He and the followers are dismantling the Sealing Chains.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He and the followers are dismantling the Sealing Chains.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He and the followers are dismantling the Sealing Chains.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fragment is 34% activated...! Going up to 43%!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fragment is 34% activated...! Going up to 43%!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fragment is 34% activated...! Going up to 43%!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's increasing! At this rate...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's increasing! At this rate...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's increasing! At this rate...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bollocks! We won't even have enough time to evacuate!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bollocks! We won't even have enough time to evacuate!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bollocks! We won't even have enough time to evacuate!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're going to lose the Fragment! We have to destroy the facility, now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're going to lose the Fragment! We have to destroy the facility, now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're going to lose the Fragment! We have to destroy the facility, now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is control room!
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is control room!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is control room!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Chief, we are ready to bury them alive at any moment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Chief, we are ready to bury them alive at any moment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Chief, we are ready to bury them alive at any moment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. The Institution will not forget your noble sacrifice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. The Institution will not forget your noble sacrifice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. The Institution will not forget your noble sacrifice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From here on end, LAKE-4 will be entering complete destruction.
root.m_Talk_DEU: From here on end, LAKE-4 will be entering complete destruction.
root.m_Talk_FRA: From here on end, LAKE-4 will be entering complete destruction.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the responsibility...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the responsibility...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the responsibility...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: will be all mine to shoulder.
root.m_Talk_DEU: will be all mine to shoulder.
root.m_Talk_FRA: will be all mine to shoulder.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Orders received, Chief!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Orders received, Chief!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Orders received, Chief!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Destroy LAKE-4! Detonate all explosives!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Destroy LAKE-4! Detonate all explosives!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Destroy LAKE-4! Detonate all explosives!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Detonate!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Detonate!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Detonate!

root.m_Talk_ENG: LAKE-4 has been destroyed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: LAKE-4 has been destroyed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: LAKE-4 has been destroyed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fragment is at 0%, and no... lifeforms detected.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fragment is at 0%, and no... lifeforms detected.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fragment is at 0%, and no... lifeforms detected.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good work everyone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good work everyone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good work everyone.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
And I'll be giving the commanding power of the next quarantine facility to
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
And I'll be giving the commanding power of the next quarantine facility to
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
And I'll be giving the commanding power of the next quarantine facility to
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: C-chief...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: C-chief...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: C-chief...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We received comms from the commander line... of the lost LAKE-4.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We received comms from the commander line... of the lost LAKE-4.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We received comms from the commander line... of the lost LAKE-4.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The F-Fragment...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The F-Fragment...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The F-Fragment...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You swallowed the giant Fragment... in an instant...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You swallowed the giant Fragment... in an instant...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You swallowed the giant Fragment... in an instant...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what are you... I need to warn Chief...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what are you... I need to warn Chief...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what are you... I need to warn Chief...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be borrowing this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be borrowing this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be borrowing this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Just as I thought.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Just as I thought.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Just as I thought.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I had expected as much, but it is still interesting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I had expected as much, but it is still interesting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I had expected as much, but it is still interesting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are leading people in this world as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are leading people in this world as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are leading people in this world as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you would sacrifice the small for the greater cause, once again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you would sacrifice the small for the greater cause, once again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you would sacrifice the small for the greater cause, once again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Heir of Pendragon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Heir of Pendragon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Heir of Pendragon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am well aware that I'm famous.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am well aware that I'm famous.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am well aware that I'm famous.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it is very disturbing to hear my family's name being uttered by a complete stranger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it is very disturbing to hear my family's name being uttered by a complete stranger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it is very disturbing to hear my family's name being uttered by a complete stranger.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you the worshipper of the false god that defeated Ryan?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you the worshipper of the false god that defeated Ryan?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you the worshipper of the false god that defeated Ryan?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ryan? Ahh, right. He was a well-trained hound.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ryan? Ahh, right. He was a well-trained hound.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ryan? Ahh, right. He was a well-trained hound.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was able to enjoy the fight thanks to him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was able to enjoy the fight thanks to him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was able to enjoy the fight thanks to him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Enough nonsense.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Enough nonsense.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Enough nonsense.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I do not know for what reason you are doing this,
root.m_Talk_DEU: I do not know for what reason you are doing this,
root.m_Talk_FRA: I do not know for what reason you are doing this,

root.m_Talk_ENG: but you're cultists who haven't even been recognized by the Society. Do you really wish to wage a full-scale war on the Institution?
root.m_Talk_DEU: but you're cultists who haven't even been recognized by the Society. Do you really wish to wage a full-scale war on the Institution?
root.m_Talk_FRA: but you're cultists who haven't even been recognized by the Society. Do you really wish to wage a full-scale war on the Institution?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not willing to answer, I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not willing to answer, I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not willing to answer, I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, here is your last chance to defend yourself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, here is your last chance to defend yourself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, here is your last chance to defend yourself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where is the Fragment that was sealed at LAKE-4?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where is the Fragment that was sealed at LAKE-4?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where is the Fragment that was sealed at LAKE-4?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah. Of course.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah. Of course.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah. Of course.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It would be unwise to go on a full-scale war with the Institution considering the number of people we currently have.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It would be unwise to go on a full-scale war with the Institution considering the number of people we currently have.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It would be unwise to go on a full-scale war with the Institution considering the number of people we currently have.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I am so fully aware of the way you do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I am so fully aware of the way you do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I am so fully aware of the way you do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The way we do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The way we do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The way we do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then your attacking different facilities at once is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then your attacking different facilities at once is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then your attacking different facilities at once is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought that you would sacrifice this place... to protect the other facilities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought that you would sacrifice this place... to protect the other facilities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought that you would sacrifice this place... to protect the other facilities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After all, you always mercilessly sacrifice the little people for the greater good.
root.m_Talk_DEU: After all, you always mercilessly sacrifice the little people for the greater good.
root.m_Talk_FRA: After all, you always mercilessly sacrifice the little people for the greater good.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But this place was our goal from the start.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But this place was our goal from the start.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But this place was our goal from the start.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This Fragment is enough to make preparations for waking Mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This Fragment is enough to make preparations for waking Mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This Fragment is enough to make preparations for waking Mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother wishes the Lake of Knowledge to be one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother wishes the Lake of Knowledge to be one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother wishes the Lake of Knowledge to be one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And... I will make it happen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And... I will make it happen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And... I will make it happen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if you are to stand in my way... I will kill you without a second thought.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And if you are to stand in my way... I will kill you without a second thought.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And if you are to stand in my way... I will kill you without a second thought.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Heir of Pendragon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Heir of Pendragon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Heir of Pendragon.
